releaseNotes: Persistent editor configuration and saved dock layout.
AutoSave backup system with custom folder selection.
Professional Layers and Validator panel redesigns.
New History panel for Undo/Redo visibility.
Viewport mini toolbar with Grid, Snap, object visibility toggles, Mirror and Reset.
Improved selected object highlights in the viewport.
Mirror Selected Horizontally and Vertically commands.
Auto Mirror placement mode for symmetrical stadium editing.
Improved curve handle performance on large maps.
Fixed HaxBall curve direction preview mismatch.
